queries.question: Provide a list of condo addresses and the amenities available in each condo building.
queries.sql:
SELECT c.address, f.facilities
FROM CondoBuildings c
JOIN FacilitiesAndServices f ON c.id = f.condos_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?address ?facilities WHERE {
  ?c a :CondoBuildings .
  ?f a :FacilitiesAndServices .
  ?f p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?c p:address ?address .
  ?f p:facilities ?facilities .
}

queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>

queries.question: In which city does the most senior person live and with what services?
queries.sql:
SELECT c.city, f.services
FROM CondoBuildings c
JOIN FacilitiesAndServices f ON c.id = f.condos_id
JOIN Residents r ON r.building_id  = c.id
ORDER BY r. age DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?services WHERE {
  ?c a :CondoBuildings .
  ?f a :FacilitiesAndServices .
  ?f p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?r a :Residents .
  ?r p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?c p:city ?city .
  ?f p:services ?services .
  ?r p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?city ?services WHERE {
  ?c a :CondoBuildings .
  ?f a :FacilitiesAndServices .
  ?f p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?r a :Residents .
  ?r p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?c p:city ?city .
  ?f p:services ?services .
  ?r p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?city ?facilities ?services WHERE {
  ?c a :CondoBuildings .
  ?f a :FacilitiesAndServices .
  ?f p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?r a :Residents .
  ?r p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?c p:city ?city .
  ?f p:facilities ?facilities .
  ?f p:services ?services .
  ?r p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?city ?facilities WHERE {
  ?c a :CondoBuildings .
  ?f a :FacilitiesAndServices .
  ?f p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?r a :Residents .
  ?r p:hasCondoBuildings ?c .
  ?c p:city ?city .
  ?f p:facilities ?facilities .
  ?r p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
